description_long: This object is a semi-automatic handgun with a robust, angular frame and a matte black finish adorned with various white markings and graffiti-style engravings. The slide is long and flat, featuring tally marks, stylized text, and symbols that give it a customized, urban appearance. The grip is contoured and appears to have a textured surface for improved handling, with additional markings and a slightly flared magazine base. The trigger guard is rounded and thick, providing ample space for finger placement and possibly enhanced for tactical use. The barrel is standard length, with a visible muzzle and no external threading or compensators. Overall, the handgun has a modern, tactical look with unique decorative elements that set it apart from standard-issue firearms.
description: A matte black semi-automatic handgun with white graffiti-style markings, a textured grip, and a robust, angular frame. The slide and grip feature distinctive engravings and symbols, giving it a customized urban look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular muzzle opening, front sight, and the width of the slide.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the tally marks, graffiti text, and the full profile of the slide and grip.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the flatness of the slide, rear sight, and the alignment of the barrel.
description_view_3: Right side view revealing additional symbols and markings, as well as the ergonomic contour of the grip.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is contoured with ergonomic shaping to fit the hand comfortably, featuring a textured surface that appears stippled or patterned for enhanced traction. It is predominantly matte black with white graffiti-style markings and symbols, adding a unique urban flair. The base of the grip is slightly flared, likely to aid in magazine changes, and there are no visible finger grooves but the overall shape suggests a secure hold. The surface finish is consistent with modern polymer grips, and there are no visible logos or manufacturer emblems.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is robust and rounded, with a thick profile that provides ample space for finger placement. It has a smooth, matte finish and appears reinforced for durability. There are no visible undercuts or squared-off edges, and no integrated accessories or texturing, giving it a standard but sturdy appearance.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is of standard length, extending slightly beyond the slide with a visible circular muzzle. It has a smooth, matte black exterior with no threading, porting, or compensators. There are no visible flutes or external features, and the finish matches the rest of the handgun.
attribute_slide_markings: The slide features several white graffiti-style markings, including tally marks near the front, stylized text such as 'FUN' and other symbols along the length, and additional decorative patterns. These markings are prominent and cover both sides of the slide, giving the handgun a distinctive, customized appearance. There are no visible manufacturer logos, model names, or serial numbers.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is slightly flared and beveled, providing a broader surface for easier magazine insertion and removal. It is matte black with some white markings, consistent with the rest of the grip, and does not feature any finger rests, logos, or additional texturing. The design is functional and visually integrated with the grip.
